item.title: Staff Post: Open
item.content:encoded: Images used in posted articles must comply with the site's image policy. A source must be provided on the discussion page and the source must be compatible with the site's license. The author will be notified after this posting via Wikidot PM and will have 48 hours to properly source the image before it is edited out of the page.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Love this SCP overall, just a tiny nitpick

It is currently unknown as to how the isolated vocal track from the original Adele song was obtained.

Separating the vocals from a track isn't really that hard, mashup artists do it all the time.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I'm glad to see this on the mainlist! It was really good already, and I'm glad you made the teensy tweaks to make it better.

Great job! +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Extradimensional music snobs. That's a new one. Do agree it could be more fleshed out, but what's here is enough for an upvote from me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
As I said I the draft thread, it's not doing much for me. Seeing your reply there, that perhaps it should be amusing, it's really only comin through in their initial message ("EARTH MUSIC PREFERENCE SINCE AT THE MOMENT A BIT CRAP BUT ITS OK" was admittedly pretty damn funny).

I think what this really needs to shine is some more characterization of these pirates - they're sitting about for 5 days and all they get out are a daily song? I would consider communications or commentary on intergalactic music from our charismatic host(s) - this feels insubstantial.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I love the idea of this SCP, really got me into reading deep into it.

1+

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hope you enjoy my sixth SCP, the Interdimensional Pirate Radio Station.

Creds to Leveritas, Othellothecat, Zyn, dankaar, BananaRepublic and Shaggydredlocks for all help provided with this. :)
